calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Sep-21-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Russell B. Longaway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Stagers Choice, present by Elle Longaway co-owner.
Gerald Scher, Esq. for Defendant: Olinda Newsom dba Voila Staging and Design. Ms. Newsom is also present in court.
Parties have settled, terms read into the record as follws: Defendant agreed to $2,650.00 payment, to the Plaintiff within 15 days and Plaintiff to dismissed with prejudice.
If not paid in full within 15 days, plaintiff shall have a default judgment against the defendant.
This settlement resolved all claims and no other releases.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled by the Court and placed on the CRC-225 calendar for Sept. 21, 2004 at 10 a.m. for DISMISSAL.
Motion For Order Compelling Response To Form Interrogatories & Production Of Documents & For Sanctions Thereon & Motion For Deemed Admissions & For Sanctions Thereon

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2004 Set For Trial On Aug-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
